headline: 3 Top-Ranked Dividend Stocks: A Smarter Way to Boost Your Retirement Income
summary: The traditional retirement planning approaches no longer cover all expenses in nest egg years. So what can retirees do? Thankfully, there are alternative investments that provide steady, higher-rate income streams to replace dwindling bond yields.

headline: 3 Under-the-Radar Biotech Takeover Targets for the Next Pharma Buying Spree
summary: Big pharma is hunting again, and patent cliffs are forcing buyers to overpay or miss out. Three mid-cap biotechs have quietly positioned themselves as prime acquisition targets, but only one offers the rare combination of a depressed valuation and a commercial product already gaining ground.

headline: Axtria Ignite 2026: 450+ Life Sciences Leaders Convene With a Contrarian Message -- Fix the Foundation Before You Scale AI
summary: Axtria Inc., a global leader in AI-first data & analytics solutions and platforms for the life sciences industry, hosted Axtria Ignite 2026 on June 10 and 11 at the Princeton Marriott at Forrestal under the theme "Industrializing Intelligence: The Agentic Enterprise." More than 450 executives from over 100 leading life sciences, MedTech, and biotech organizations gathered to work through the harder question of 2026: what must be true before an enterprise can trust AI to run at machine speed.

headline: Revisiting Stock Picks Intel, Progressive, Bristol Myers Squibb
summary: Looking back at past stock picks is important because it helps investors understand what worked, what didn’t, and why.  The insurance stock is down 19% over the past year but has gained 8% over the past month.
